languages.text: {n}Сгорбленные металлические плечи Себериана распрямляются с тихим скрежетом.{/n} "Буду откровенен, {name}, я понятия не имею, с чем нам придется столкнуться. Знаю лишь одно: я обязан воздать Тразину по заслугам. Он присвоил себе то, что для меня дороже жизни, и я намерен вернуть это — или погибнуть, пытаясь".

{n}Seberian's hunched metal shoulders give out a low groan as he straightens.{/n} "To be frank with you, {name}, I do not have the faintest notion of what we might face. I know only this: I must give Trazyn his comeuppance. He seized that which I value more than my own life, and I am determined to get it back — or die in the trying."
languages.original_text: {n}Сгорбленные металлические плечи Себериана распрямляются с тихим скрежетом.{/n} "Буду откровенен, {name}, я понятия не имею, с чем нам придется столкнуться. Знаю лишь одно: я обязан воздать Тразину по заслугам. Он присвоил себе то, что для меня дороже жизни, и я намерен вернуть это — или погибнуть, пытаясь".

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの丸まった金属の肩が、身を起こすにつれて低く軋む。{/n}「率直に言おう、{name}。我々が何に直面することになるのか、私には皆目見当もつかない。確かなのはただ一つ――私はトラジンに報いを与えねばならぬということだ。奴は私の命より大切なものを奪っていった。私はそれを取り戻す覚悟だ――さもなくば、その試みの中で果てるまで。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hunched metal shoulders give out a low groan as he straightens.{/n} "To be frank with you, {name}, I do not have the faintest notion of what we might face. I know only this: I must give Trazyn his comeuppance. He seized that which I value more than my own life, and I am determined to get it back — or die in the trying."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンの丸まった金属の肩が、身を起こすにつれて低く軋む。{/n}「率直に言おう、{name}。我々が何に直面することになるのか、私には皆目見当もつかない。確かなのはただ一つ――私はトラジンに報いを与えねばならぬということだ。奴は私の命より大切なものを奪っていった。私はそれを取り戻す覚悟だ――さもなくば、その試みの中で果てるまで。」

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安挺直身子，佝偻的金属肩膀发出了低沉的嘎吱声。{/n}“坦率地说，{name}，我根本不清楚我们将面对什么。我只确信一点：我必须让特拉金付出代价。他夺走了我比生命还珍视的东西，我必须把它夺回来——不成功便成仁。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hunched metal shoulders give out a low groan as he straightens.{/n} "To be frank with you, {name}, I do not have the faintest notion of what we might face. I know only this: I must give Trazyn his comeuppance. He seized that which I value more than my own life, and I am determined to get it back — or die in the trying."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安挺直身子，佝偻的金属肩膀发出了低沉的嘎吱声。{/n}“坦率地说，{name}，我根本不清楚我们将面对什么。我只确信一点：我必须让特拉金付出代价。他夺走了我比生命还珍视的东西，我必须把它夺回来——不成功便成仁。”

languages.text: {n}Seberian doğrulduğunda kambur metal omuzlarından hafif bir inilti yükseliyor.{/n} "Dürüst olmak gerekirse {name}... Neyle karşılaşabileceğimize dair en ufak bir fikrim yok. Sadece şunu biliyorum: Trazyn'e hak ettiğini vermeliyim. O, benim kendi hayatımdan daha çok değer verdiğim şeyi ele geçirdi. Onu geri almaya ya da bu uğurda ölmeye kararlıyım."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hunched metal shoulders give out a low groan as he straightens.{/n} "To be frank with you, {name}, I do not have the faintest notion of what we might face. I know only this: I must give Trazyn his comeuppance. He seized that which I value more than my own life, and I am determined to get it back — or die in the trying."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian doğrulduğunda kambur metal omuzlarından hafif bir inilti yükseliyor.{/n} "Dürüst olmak gerekirse {name}... Neyle karşılaşabileceğimize dair en ufak bir fikrim yok. Sadece şunu biliyorum: Trazyn'e hak ettiğini vermeliyim. O, benim kendi hayatımdan daha çok değer verdiğim şeyi ele geçirdi. Onu geri almaya ya da bu uğurda ölmeye kararlıyım."

languages.text: {n}Los metálicos hombros encorvados de Seberian chirrían cuando se incorpora.{/n} «Si le digo la verdad, {name}, no tengo ni idea de lo que nos espera. Solo sé una cosa: debo hacer que Trazyn pague por sus acciones. Me ha arrebatado algo que valoro más que mi propia vida, y he de recuperarlo o morir en el intento».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hunched metal shoulders give out a low groan as he straightens.{/n} "To be frank with you, {name}, I do not have the faintest notion of what we might face. I know only this: I must give Trazyn his comeuppance. He seized that which I value more than my own life, and I am determined to get it back — or die in the trying."

traits.locale_text: {n}Los metálicos hombros encorvados de Seberian chirrían cuando se incorpora.{/n} «Si le digo la verdad, {name}, no tengo ni idea de lo que nos espera. Solo sé una cosa: debo hacer que Trazyn pague por sus acciones. Me ha arrebatado algo que valoro más que mi propia vida, y he de recuperarlo o morir en el intento».

languages.text: {n}Les épaules métalliques de Seberian émettent un grincement sourd lorsqu'il se redresse.{/n} « Pour tout vous dire, {name}, je n'ai pas la moindre idée de ce qui nous attend. Je ne sais qu'une chose : je dois infliger à Trazyn la punition qu'il mérite. Il m'a pris quelque chose que je chéris plus que ma propre vie, et je compte bien le lui reprendre... ou mourir en essayant. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hunched metal shoulders give out a low groan as he straightens.{/n} "To be frank with you, {name}, I do not have the faintest notion of what we might face. I know only this: I must give Trazyn his comeuppance. He seized that which I value more than my own life, and I am determined to get it back — or die in the trying."

traits.locale_text: {n}Les épaules métalliques de Seberian émettent un grincement sourd lorsqu'il se redresse.{/n} « Pour tout vous dire, {name}, je n'ai pas la moindre idée de ce qui nous attend. Je ne sais qu'une chose : je dois infliger à Trazyn la punition qu'il mérite. Il m'a pris quelque chose que je chéris plus que ma propre vie, et je compte bien le lui reprendre... ou mourir en essayant. »

languages.text: {n}Seberians gebeugte Metallschultern ächzen bedrohlich, als er sich aufrichtet.{/n} "Um ehrlich zu sein, {name}, habe ich nicht die geringste Ahnung, was uns erwartet. Ich weiß nur eines: Trazyn muss seine wohlverdiente Strafe bekommen. Er nahm mir, was mir wichtiger ist, als mein eigenes Leben, und das werde ich mir zurückholen ... oder beim Versuch sterben."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hunched metal shoulders give out a low groan as he straightens.{/n} "To be frank with you, {name}, I do not have the faintest notion of what we might face. I know only this: I must give Trazyn his comeuppance. He seized that which I value more than my own life, and I am determined to get it back — or die in the trying."
